metrics.name: k6SuccessRatio
metrics.query: sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"e2741182-1908-4146-82b7-4a99c282e04e", expected_response="true", scenario!="default"}[1m])) / sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"e2741182-1908-4146-82b7-4a99c282e04e", scenario!="default"}[1m]))

metrics.name: k6FailureRatio
metrics.query: 1 - (sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"e2741182-1908-4146-82b7-4a99c282e04e", expected_response="true", scenario!="default"}[1m])) / sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"e2741182-1908-4146-82b7-4a99c282e04e", scenario!="default"}[1m])))
